coreResponsibility: A Chromecast sender plugin that integrates the Google Cast Chrome Sender Framework API with the Kaltura Player JS, enabling users to cast media playback from a Chrome browser to Chromecast-enabled devices.

featureOwnership: Remote media loading and playback control on Chromecast receiver
Cast playback state synchronization between sender and receiver
Track management during casting (audio, video, text/subtitles)
Text track styling and customization during casting
Volume and mute control on remote device
Live streaming and DVR support during casting
Cast UI presets for playback, live, ads, and idle states
Custom message channel communication between sender and receiver
dataHandling: Remote player state machine (idle, playing, paused, buffering)
Media info and configuration for cast receiver

upstream: @playkit-js/kaltura-player-js - Core player framework and remote player base classes
Google Cast Chrome Sender Framework SDK - Cast functionality and API
downstream: Kaltura Player JS UI - Consumes cast UI presets
playkit-js-cast-receiver - Receives media load requests and playback commands
Web applications using Kaltura Player - Enables Chromecast functionality

externalAPIs: Google Cast Chrome Sender Framework API (cast.framework.*)
Kaltura Player JS Remote Framework (BaseRemotePlayer, RemoteControl, RemoteSession)
Kaltura Player JS Core (EventType, Track, TextStyle, State)

entryPoints: src/index.js - Main entry point, registers CastPlayer as remote player
src/cast-player.js - Core CastPlayer class extending BaseRemotePlayer
src/cast-tracks-manager.js - Manages audio/video/text tracks during casting
src/cast-playback-engine.js - Controls playback on remote device
src/cast-ui.js - UI presets for cast states
